assumptions: I/O and packet scheduling are likely to become the bottleneck before the permutation logic.
Scale by increasing pipeline count and stream aggregation width.

candidates.name: xilinx_high_four_pipelines_12ctx_axis256
candidates.summary: Four fully pipelined engines with 12 contexts each and aggregated 256-bit stream ingress.

candidates.name: xilinx_high_eight_pipelines_12ctx_extreme
notes: Use only when the host/DMA subsystem can feed enough independent packets.
candidates.summary: Extreme scaling point: eight pipelines and 96 contexts total.
